headline: S&P Global Spin Offs Mobility To Sharpen Capital Markets Focus
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) plans to spin off its Mobility segment into a separate public company, Mobility Global, Inc. The transaction is expected to be completed by mid 2026, creating a standalone automotive focused technology business. The separation will leave S&P Global more concentrated on its core benchmarks, ratings, and data businesses, while Mobility Global, Inc. focuses on automotive data and software products. S&P Global sits at the center of credit ratings, benchmarks, and data for...
